problems.short_description: Switch occasionally drops connections
Exchange server outage
problems.close_notes: needed latest patch - after patch all is well
problems.fix_notes: needed latest patch - after patch all is well

problems.short_description: Lawson DB seems to be running slowly
problems.description: Lawson DB seems to be running slowly. Tried several things and need to find the root cause

problems.short_description: Slow switching
Oracle database running slowly and dropping connections
problems.description: Oracle database running slowly and dropping connections
problems.close_notes: Intermittent issue, restarting as a workaround until this happens more frequently

problems.short_description: Email down
problems.description: Email went down - failed over to alternate server but need to determine root cause on ironMail-SD-01
problems.close_notes: patched server all is fine now.
problems.cause_notes: Log shows ISP was dropping/resetting the connection
problems.fix_notes: ISP applied a fix on their side and mails are flowing smoothly again

problems.short_description: Email system is down again
Request for a Blackberry
problems.close_notes: This is a Service Catalog item request

problems.short_description: USB port has stopped working
problems.close_notes: OS and hardware vendor cannot find the root cause as it is intermittent. So they recommend restarting the PC
problems.workaround: As this is intermittent. Restarting the PC fixes this.
problems.cause_notes: This is a timing issue caused when you plug and unplug USB devices quickly

problems.short_description: My laptop is performing very badly
problems.description: A few days ago I made some modification to some Windows config, and since then my laptop is performing slowly. Is there any way to go back to a previous state?

problems.short_description: The Webex application is unavailable to all employees
problems.cause_notes: Server does not meet minimum specs to run the meeting server
problems.fix_notes: Upgrade CPU and RAM to meet minimum specs

problems.short_description: Windows XP SP2 causing errors in Enterprise
problems.description: SP2 is causing several applications not to work anymore.
problems.cause_notes: Corporate desktop apps do not support SP2

problems.short_description: Hang when trying to print VISIO document
Boot with shift key held down
problems.description: If the shift key is not held down, the RAID enclosure does not power on.

problems.short_description: Unable to send or receive emails.
problems.description: Unable to send or receive emails.Looks like issue is with the email server.

problems.short_description: Unable to connect to Wifi
problems.description: Not able to connect to Wifi. Tried to connect with different devices.

problems.short_description: Nango test problem created via dryrun
Nango test problem created via dryrun
Unable to connect to the VPN
problems.description: Unable to connect to the VPN using the valid credentials.

problems.short_description: Nango temporary problem - updated via dryrun
Router Down
problems.description: The 1st floor router is down again. Nobody down there can get at anything outside their own subnet.

problems.short_description: 2nd Floor File Server Short on Space
problems.description: We really, really need to buy more drives for the second floor file. The users keep filling up their 10 MB quota, and they aren't going to take it much longer.

problems.short_description: Oracle Down
problems.description: The PeopleSoft Oracle instance is down (again).

problems.short_description: Issue in connecting to internet using modem.
problems.description: Issue in connecting to internet using modem.

problems.short_description: Can't access SFA software
problems.description: Performance of the Siebel SFA software has been severely degraded since the upgrade performed this weekend. We moved to an unsupported Oracle DB version.
problems.cause_notes: Siebel SFA does not support this version of Orcale
problems.fix_notes: Upgrade to the latest version of Oracle
